This was a really clean explanation of VWAP without overcomplicating it. I’ve been using the first light beacon alongside levels like this and it’s crazy how well VWAP lines up with structural areas when you look at it through order flow instead of just as a line. Treating it as an area and adding HTF anchors makes a big difference too. Definitely one of those tools that works way better when you combine it with structure instead of using it alone.
